name: Sour Cream Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
a Gourmet Magazine favorite from 1981
This is the Rolls-Royce of bran muffin recipes.
In a large bowl with an electric mixer cream together
the butter and the brown sugar until the mixture is
light and fluffy. Beat in the egg, sour cream, and molasses,
and stir in the raisins. In a separate bowl whisk together
the flour, baking soda, salt, and bran. Add the dry ingredients
to the wet ingredients and stir the batter until it is just combined.
The batter will be lumpy. Spoon the batter into 12 well-buttered muffin tins.
Bake in the middle of a preheated 400°F oven for 15 to 20 minutes,
or until golden brown and springy to the touch. Turn out the muffins
onto a rack and let them cool.
(Miller's bran is available at natural foods stores, specialty foods shops, and some supermarkets)
Makes 12 muffins.
